rbac_tasks.notes: GET /tasks now consults local session and /auth/me/access-context to enforce tasks:read or tasks:write:own and location scoping. Additional TypeScript typecheck failures exist across the api-server package unrelated to this change.

tests.reason: No test harness found for api-server in repository (no test scripts). Next step: add unit/integration tests using the project's preferred test runner (Jest/Mocha) and wire them into pnpm scripts.
